name: Parallel Plate Capacitor
description: Calculate capacitance, charge, energy, and electric field for parallel plate capacitors
identification_signal: Two parallel conducting plates separated by distance, often with dielectric material

strategy.step_1: Calculate capacitance from geometry: C = ε₀A/d
strategy.step_2: Relate Q, C, and V using Q = CV
strategy.step_3: Calculate stored energy using U = ½CV²
strategy.step_4: For dielectrics: multiply C by dielectric constant κ

front.text: Two circular plates of radius 5 cm separated by 2 mm

back.title: Parallel Plate Capacitor
back.explanation: Use C = ε₀A/d where A = πr². Can also find E = V/d between plates.

steps.title: Charge and Energy Relations
steps.instruction: Q = CV for charge. Three forms for energy: ½CV², ½QV, Q²/2C.
steps.why: Use the form with known quantities

problem_cards.prompt_latex: A = 0.01 \text{ m}^2, d = 1 \text{ mm}, V = 12 \text{ V}

solution.verification: Units check: ε₀ in F/m, A in m², d in m → C in F ✓
